label: n8n
grantCopy: Your n8n workflows become agent tools. An agent that can run a workflow can do whatever that workflow does — expose deliberately, per workspace.

label: Google Drive
grantCopy: Agents read and write the Drive files your account can. Client data in, deliverables out — grant per workspace.

label: Gmail
grantCopy: Mail is a sensitive surface: an agent here reads and sends AS YOU. Grant narrowly and watch the trail.

label: Google Calendar
grantCopy: Agents see and manage the calendars your account can.

label: Google Chat
grantCopy: An agent here speaks in your chats as you. Grant deliberately.

label: Slack
grantCopy: LOUD one: an agent connected to Slack SPEAKS AS YOU to your team. A prompt-injected agent could message anyone you can. Grant per workspace, keep the reviewer gate on, read the trail.

label: GitHub
grantCopy: Repos, issues, and PRs your account can touch. OAuth per CLI (vendor-preferred, per-CLI revocation) — or one PAT for all agents via the vault: one paste, shared blast radius.

label: Vercel
grantCopy: Deployments, projects, and logs your Vercel account can reach.

label: Supabase
grantCopy: Schema, auth, and edge functions — OAuth is currently all-or-nothing on permissions. OAuth per CLI, or one PAT for all agents via the vault (one paste, shared blast radius).

label: GoHighLevel
grantCopy: Client pipelines and automations your agency runs — an agent here acts on real client accounts. Grant narrowly.

label: ClickUp
grantCopy: Tasks become agent prompts; finished work reports back to the ticket. OAuth only (no API-key auth).

label: Make.com
grantCopy: Your Make scenarios as agent tools — 3,000+ apps of transitive reach. An agent that can run a scenario can do what the scenario does.

label: Sentry
grantCopy: Issues, traces, and releases. OAuth per CLI, or one auth token for all agents via the vault. Self-hosted Sentry: override the base URL.

label: PostHog
grantCopy: Product analytics via your personal API key — reference it as an env pointer; the key itself never enters a config file.

label: Stripe
grantCopy: LOUDEST one: this is MONEY. An agent here can touch customers, charges, and payouts your account can. A prompt-injected agent is a real financial risk — grant to one trusted workspace at most, keep write tools off, watch the trail.

label: Cloudflare (docs)
grantCopy: Cloudflare's documentation server — read-only, no account. Their account-scoped servers (API, observability, bindings) arrive via the registry.

label: AWS (API suite)

cliQuirks.claude-code: rides your default AWS credential chain (aws configure / SSO)

grantCopy: AWS API operations under YOUR local credential chain — the agent can do what your aws CLI can. Scope the IAM role narrowly; this is infrastructure.

label: Microsoft Azure

cliQuirks.claude-code: picks up your az login (Entra chain)

grantCopy: Azure operations under your az login. Infrastructure blast radius — grant narrowly.

label: GitLab
grantCopy: Projects, issues, and MRs (GitLab 18.6+ instances). Self-managed: override the base URL — same path on your host.

label: Notion
grantCopy: Pages and databases your account can touch — agents write where you can.

label: Tally
grantCopy: Forms and submissions, read and write — free on all plans.

label: Zapier
grantCopy: Your Zaps and 7,000+ connected apps — huge transitive reach; an agent here can trigger anything you wired. Grant deliberately.

label: Jira / Atlassian
grantCopy: Jira issues and Confluence pages your account can reach.

label: Figma
grantCopy: Design files and components your account can read — designs in, code out.

label: Postman
grantCopy: Collections and APIs from your Postman workspaces.

label: Airtable
grantCopy: Bases and records your account can touch — client data lives here; grant per workspace.

label: Jotform
grantCopy: Forms and submissions your account holds.

label: Replicate
grantCopy: Run models on your Replicate account — generation bills to you; grant to workspaces that should spend.

label: fal.ai

cliQuirks.codex: Key-scheme header unsupported (bearer only) — use claude/gemini or the env-ref

grantCopy: 1,000+ gen-media models on your fal key — generation bills to you. The key rides as an env pointer, never a literal.

label: ElevenLabs
grantCopy: Voice generation on your ElevenLabs key (env pointer) — characters bill to you.

label: Higgsfield
grantCopy: 30+ gen-media models on your Higgsfield account (sign in, no API keys). Generation is async and credit-billed — agents poll for results.
